assertions.description: The text-overflow property accepts ellipsis for single-line truncation.
The text-overflow property accepts clip, the value used when an ellipsis is not painted.
Focusing an overflowing input leaves the authored text-overflow value inspectable as ellipsis while the visual interaction is handled by the browser.
assertions.test: (()=>{const i=document.createElement('input');i.value='a very long text-overflow ellipsis test string';i.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:0;top:0;width:64px;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;text-overflow:ellipsis;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;';document.body.appendChild(i);i.focus();const cs=getComputedStyle(i);const ok=document.activeElement===i&&cs.textOverflow==='ellipsis'&&i.scrollWidth>=i.clientWidth;i.remove();return ok;})()

assertions.description: An overflowing contenteditable element with text-overflow:ellipsis can receive focus and text selection, exercising the editable interaction path.
assertions.test: (()=>{const d=document.createElement('div');d.contentEditable='true';d.textContent='a very long contenteditable text-overflow ellipsis test string';d.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:0;top:0;width:72px;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;text-overflow:ellipsis;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;';document.body.appendChild(d);d.focus();const range=document.createRange();range.selectNodeContents(d);const sel=getSelection();sel.removeAllRanges();sel.addRange(range);const cs=getComputedStyle(d);const ok=document.activeElement===d&&cs.textOverflow==='ellipsis'&&d.scrollWidth>d.clientWidth&&sel.toString().includes('contenteditable');sel.removeAllRanges();d.remove();return ok;})()

assertions.description: The Chrome 147 interaction behavior does not require two-value text-overflow syntax; unsupported two-value parsing must not be treated as a failed interaction.
Multi-line clamping uses -webkit-line-clamp rather than the single-line text-overflow interaction path.
assertions.test: (()=>{const d=document.createElement('div');d.style.cssText='display:-webkit-box;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;-webkit-line-clamp:2;overflow:hidden;width:80px;';d.textContent='line clamp is a separate multiline truncation surface';document.body.appendChild(d);const cs=getComputedStyle(d);const ok=CSS.supports('-webkit-line-clamp','2')&&cs.textOverflow==='clip';d.remove();return ok;})()
